developer_mode_desc: Shows the log console for debugging.
search_drives_message: Aurora will scan all drives to locate your Neverness To Everness installation. This may take a few seconds.
toast_game_not_found: Could not find NTE. Set path manually in Settings.
censorship_removal_desc: Removes the alpha effect when looking at characters on an angle. (Credits: cp0bi)
no_drive_line_desc: Removes the 3D GPS driving line created while driving. (Credits: Rokkudayo)
